summary: Tightened qd roadmap validation so registries use stable milestone metadata and non-null node milestones reference registered milestone names.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects non-array registries.groups, registries.projects, or registries.milestones.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: The export envelope check now requires registries.groups, registries.projects, and registries.milestones to be arrays; evidence/m4-qd-registry-schema-contract/negative-smoke-malformed-registry-collections.log records the expected rejection.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects blank or duplicate registries.milestones[].name values.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: validate_roadmap_milestone_names trims and rejects blank names, and validate_roadmap_milestone_duplicate_field rejects repeated names; evidence/m4-qd-registry-schema-contract/negative-smoke-duplicate-milestone.log records a duplicate name failing.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects duplicate or non-integer registries.milestones[].rank values.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: validate_roadmap_milestone_ranks rejects non-integer ranks, and validate_roadmap_milestone_duplicate_field rejects repeated ranks; evidence/m4-qd-registry-schema-contract/negative-smoke-bad-rank.log and negative-smoke-duplicate-rank.log record the expected failures.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects registries.milestones[].created_at values other than 1970-01-01T00:00:00.000Z.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: validate_roadmap_milestone_created_at requires deterministic epoch timestamps; evidence/m4-qd-registry-schema-contract/negative-smoke-bad-created-at.log records a changed timestamp failing.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects non-null nodes[].milestone values that do not match a registered milestone name.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: validate_roadmap_node_milestones indexes registered milestone names and rejects unknown non-null node milestones; evidence/m4-qd-registry-schema-contract/negative-smoke-unknown-node-milestone.log records the expected rejection.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Existing qd reports and roadmap export pass the stricter check.

Linux validation evidence records just qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, and temporary-copy negative smoke tests for malformed registry collections, duplicate milestone, bad rank, bad created_at, and unknown node milestone.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: The evidence directory contains direct qd report validation, the full Nix check, git diff checking, and the requested temporary-copy negative smoke logs.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: This node only changes repository qd metadata validation; realWorldValidation is marked not_required.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd metadata validation only; no product runtime, macOS, hardware, capture, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, or latency behavior is claimed.
